name: Double Peanut Butter Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream the peanut butter, butter, and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs; mix well.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl.
4. Add the dry ingredients alternately with milk to the creamy mixture, mixing well after each addition.
5. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Cool on a wire rack.
8. For frosting: In another bowl, cream the chunky peanut butter and softened butter until smooth.
9. Gradually add powdered sugar, milk, and vanilla; mix until well combined.
10. Frost the cooled cake.
